programs.title: Manganinnie
programs.desc: Australia, 1830. Edward Waterman and his family arrive in a remote part of Tasmania, known at the time as Van Diemen's Land. Waterman is pressured into helping British colonial forces carry out the Black Line – enforced removal of Aborigines from land near white settlements. Aboriginal woman Manganinnie survives a Black Line raid which claims the life of her husband, Meenopeekameena.

programs.title: Stompem Ground 2022 - Karajarri Dancers
programs.desc: Karajarri dancers are from Mijil Mil Miya, 180 km southwest of Broome. Lead singer Mervyn Mulardy has revived several Karajarri traditional songs inherited from his grandfather and mother.

programs.title: On Country Kitchen
programs.sub_title: Honey, Fritto Misto & Red Wine Tart
programs.desc: Dwayne Bannon-Harrison shares a traditional dance with Mark and Derek. And in Berry, the boys visit a sustainable vineyard.

programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: Adam and guests, chef and game harvester Ross O'Meara, and culinary travel journalist Sofia Levin are making easy autumnal dinners.

programs.title: Spartakus And The Sun Beneath The Sea
programs.desc: At the edge of the ice layer of Icelandis there may be a door leading to Arkadia. If you reach it, you have to overcome many dangers, solve many puzzles, and dare to face  the terrible Arakoee.

programs.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programs.desc: The original 80s animation classic that follows a young orphan called Esteban as he searches the New World for both his father and the mysterious Cities of Gold.
